q: Can the police search my personal mobile phone without a judicial warrant?
description: Examines warrantless searches of personal digital devices under the fundamental right to privacy.

q: What rights do I have if I am detained by police without being told the charges?
description: Details protection against arbitrary arrest and detention, including the right to know grounds of arrest.

q: Can the government acquire private agricultural land without paying fair market compensation?
description: Explores the constitutional right to property and requirements for state acquisition.

q: Does reservation apply to appointments in private joint ventures funded by the state?
description: Checks the boundaries of public employment quotas in entities with mixed state-private funding.

q: Can state institutions mandate a specific dress code overriding religious practices?
description: Analyzes the freedom of conscience and free profession, practice, and propagation of religion.

q: Can the government ban peaceful protests or assemblies in public parks under Section 144?
description: Evaluates limits on freedom of speech and expression and the right to assemble peaceably.

q: Does a voter have the fundamental right to know the educational background and assets of candidates?
description: Investigates voter information transparency as an extension of the freedom of expression.

q: Are fundamental rights under Article 21 suspended during a national emergency declaration?
description: Examines emergency suspension of fundamental rights enforcement under constitutional amendments.

q: Can a minor child claim a fundamental right to free education in a private unassisted school?
description: Checks the scope of the right to education regarding private educational institutes.

q: Does the right to clean drinking water and a pollution-free environment fall under the Right to Life?
description: Connects environmental degradation and public health to the broad interpretation of life.
